name: Dandelion Flower Fritters
recipeInstructions:
This variation on pancakes uses the yellow puffs of
the dandelion, a good source of Vitamin A.
1. In a bowl, mix together flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, beat egg, then mix with milk or water and olive oil. Combine with dry mixture.
3. Gently stir in the yellow dandelion flowers, taking care not to crush them.
4. Lightly spray a griddle or frying pan with vegetable oil. Heat until thoroughly warmed.
5. Pour batter onto the griddle by spoonfuls and cook like pancakes.
6. Makes 10 fritters.
